user.title: GitHub Config Sync
user.description: Connect GitHub, choose sync timing, and configure ignore patterns.

device_auth.title: GitHub Device Authorization
device_auth.description: Approve the device login in GitHub to continue.

repo_choice.title: Repository Setup
repo_choice.description: Choose whether to create a new repository or use an existing one.

create_repo.title: Create Repository
create_repo.description: Create a new private repository for Home Assistant config sync.

existing_repo.title: Use Existing Repository
existing_repo.description: Enter the GitHub repository name in owner/repo format.

error.invalid_repository: Enter a repository name in owner/repo format.
error.invalid_time: Enter a valid 24-hour time in HH:MM format.
